component.name: MainScene
component.script:
sub init() m.fCount = 0 m.gCount = 0 end sub
sub onStart() print "onStart" ' Direct reentrant assignment: onF runs synchronously (nested). m.top.fieldF = [1, 1] print "onStart done" end sub
sub onF() m.fCount = m.fCount + 1 if m.fCount <= 3 then print "onF count="; m.fCount m.top.fieldG = [2, 2] end sub
sub onG() m.gCount = m.gCount + 1 if m.gCount <= 3 then print "onG count="; m.gCount m.top.fieldF = [1, 1] end sub
